steps.question: Namaste, I am VaaniCare. Are you comfortable answering a few quick questions about your health today?
Kya aapne aaj apni diabetes ki dawai waqt par li hai?
Kya aapko weakness, chakar aana, ya seene mein koi dard mehsoos ho raha hai?
Kya aapne pichle 2 din mein apni sugar check ki thi? Agar haan, toh reading kya thi?
